beats.directive: Restate Q1-Q4 (layout shape, directory names, file names, entry-point coherence). Halt-rule: if synthesis names a non-layout/non-naming dominant axis, stop and surface misroute.
In: tools/, bin/, root config files, .github/agents/. Out: source code inside files, test bodies, runs/*.json content.
List every directory and notable file with a one-line 'what it is'. Flag mismatches between name and content.
Name 2-3 candidate dominant axes (flat-vs-nested, vocab-leakage, entry-point-fragmentation). Predict cite count for each.
Per directory/file: keep-name | rename | move | delete | unresolved. With cite per claim.
Name the dominant axis. HALT if axis is not layout/naming.
Emit <=8 refactor targets ranked by (confusion-severity x cite-count). Each: imperative title, scope, template tag, prereq IDs.
